readings.Aries: You are already past the point of hesitation. You just haven't caught up to yourself yet. This situation responds well to direct engagement.
readings.Taurus: What feels like stability might be stagnation. It is worth sitting with the discomfort of not knowing. Sleep on it before committing.
readings.Gemini: You've been charming your way past something that actually requires a direct response. This situation responds well to direct engagement.
readings.Cancer: Your memory holds things gently that others would have dropped. Today that gift is needed. Simpler is correct here.
readings.Leo: Your radiance is not depleted by giving — it's amplified. Give more. The answer that feels too obvious is probably the actual answer.
readings.Virgo: You are harder on yourself than on anyone you love. Apply the same standard in both directions. There's more support available than you've asked for.
readings.Libra: The person you've been accommodating has more capacity than you've been giving them credit for. Expect more. Make contact with the actual person rather than the version in your head.
readings.Scorpio: Something you suspected for months just became something you know. Now decide. Let this one be easy.
readings.Sagittarius: The freedom you're seeking is available now, in this constraint. Find it. The week ahead rewards preparation you can still do today.
readings.Capricorn: Something you've dismissed as not yet achievable is closer than the plan shows. The question matters more than the answer right now.
readings.Aquarius: There's loneliness in always being slightly ahead. Acknowledge it. It doesn't make you less visionary. Trust the slow version of this over the fast one.
readings.Pisces: There is a person in your life who is grounding and steadying and you take them for granted. Don't. There's more support available than you've asked for.

Aries-Aries.synthesis: There is enough heat between you to forge something remarkable or burn it all down. Usually both.

Aries-Taurus.synthesis: The heat is useful when the earth channels it. The earth is useful when the fire can wait long enough.

Aries-Gemini.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Aries-Cancer.synthesis: One of you runs toward; one guards the door. The dance is interesting until someone gets tired.

Aries-Leo.synthesis: There is enough heat between you to forge something remarkable or burn it all down. Usually both.

Aries-Virgo.synthesis: Your natural speeds are different. Finding the pace that doesn't frustrate either of you is the whole project.

Aries-Libra.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Aries-Scorpio.synthesis: You affect each other immediately and completely. That's not always comfortable and not always harmful.

Aries-Sagittarius.synthesis: The competition is never stated and never absent. You perform for each other even when you don't mean to.

Aries-Capricorn.synthesis: The heat is useful when the earth channels it. The earth is useful when the fire can wait long enough.

Aries-Aquarius.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Aries-Pisces.synthesis: You challenge each other's default mode — which is either exactly what you needed or what you weren't ready for.

Taurus-Taurus.synthesis: Neither of you wastes anything. The question is whether you're saving the relationship or just managing it.

Taurus-Gemini.synthesis: The ideas need grounding. The ground needs ideas. Neither of you finds this as obvious as it sounds.

Taurus-Cancer.synthesis: The support here is genuine and sometimes suffocating. The line between them is worth watching.

Taurus-Leo.synthesis: You work well when one agrees to be the foundation and the other agrees to be the spark. Agreement is the hard part.

Taurus-Virgo.synthesis: The security you build together is real. Real security sometimes disguises the need for something more.

Taurus-Libra.synthesis: You need each other more than you'll admit, and you both demonstrate this through argument.

Taurus-Scorpio.synthesis: One of you protects, one of you nourishes. At some point both of you need to be taken care of.

Taurus-Sagittarius.synthesis: In theory you stabilise each other. In practice, one of you always feels slightly extinguished.

Taurus-Capricorn.synthesis: The practical language between you is fluent and efficient. The emotional one takes more effort from both.

Taurus-Aquarius.synthesis: The friction between you is productive until the day one of you decides it isn't worth it. Don't let it go that long.

Taurus-Pisces.synthesis: The stability and the depth work well together — until they work too well and nobody grows.

Gemini-Gemini.synthesis: You understand each other at a speed that feels like recognition. Familiarity this fast always hides something.

Gemini-Cancer.synthesis: You reach each other through completely different routes. The meeting place is interesting and unstable.

Gemini-Leo.synthesis: You accelerate each other. The direction you're heading is worth establishing before you reach full speed.

Gemini-Virgo.synthesis: You complement each other in ways neither fully acknowledges. The acknowledgment is the missing piece.

Gemini-Libra.synthesis: You both live a little inside your heads. When you're together, the heads get very crowded.

Gemini-Scorpio.synthesis: The connection is real and confusing to both of you. You're not sure how it works. It works anyway.

Gemini-Sagittarius.synthesis: You bring out ambition in each other. Whose ambition you're actually serving is a fair question.

Gemini-Capricorn.synthesis: What you bring each other is exactly what the other struggles to generate alone. This should be easy. It isn't.

Gemini-Aquarius.synthesis: The ideas between you breed more ideas. At some point one of them needs to become something real.

Gemini-Pisces.synthesis: You make each other think differently — one about the world, one about themselves. That's not nothing.

Cancer-Cancer.synthesis: Nobody outside this pairing fully understands what happens inside it. That's exactly how you want it.

Cancer-Leo.synthesis: You challenge each other's default mode — which is either exactly what you needed or what you weren't ready for.

Cancer-Virgo.synthesis: The stability and the depth work well together — until they work too well and nobody grows.

Cancer-Libra.synthesis: You reach each other through completely different routes. The meeting place is interesting and unstable.

Cancer-Scorpio.synthesis: Nobody outside this pairing fully understands what happens inside it. That's exactly how you want it.

Cancer-Sagittarius.synthesis: The intensity is real. Whether it's connection or pressure depends on which day you're asking.

Cancer-Capricorn.synthesis: The support here is genuine and sometimes suffocating. The line between them is worth watching.

Cancer-Aquarius.synthesis: The mismatch in how you process things is a feature in good times and a fault line in bad ones.

Cancer-Pisces.synthesis: The emotional fluency here is extraordinary. The risk is drowning in it before finding solid ground.

Leo-Leo.synthesis: There is enough heat between you to forge something remarkable or burn it all down. Usually both.

Leo-Virgo.synthesis: Something transformative is possible here — if neither of you insists on doing it alone.

Leo-Libra.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Leo-Scorpio.synthesis: One of you runs toward; one guards the door. The dance is interesting until someone gets tired.

Leo-Sagittarius.synthesis: You give each other permission to be more yourselves. Sometimes that permission is exactly the problem.

Leo-Capricorn.synthesis: There's something genuinely generative in the friction. Whether either of you can tolerate friction is the question.

Leo-Aquarius.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Leo-Pisces.synthesis: The attraction was always obvious. The sustainability is the question neither of you has fully answered.

Virgo-Virgo.synthesis: Shared values make for comfort. They also make it easier to avoid the conversation you keep not having.

Virgo-Libra.synthesis: What you bring each other is exactly what the other struggles to generate alone. This should be easy. It isn't.

Virgo-Scorpio.synthesis: You care for each other in ways that are practical and non-intrusive. Neither says much. Both notice everything.

Virgo-Sagittarius.synthesis: The slow materials and the fast energy can build something neither could alone. Patience is required from the fire.

Virgo-Capricorn.synthesis: You anchor each other well. Make sure neither of you has quietly agreed to stop moving entirely.

Virgo-Aquarius.synthesis: What you bring each other is exactly what the other struggles to generate alone. This should be easy. It isn't.

Virgo-Pisces.synthesis: You care for each other in ways that are practical and non-intrusive. Neither says much. Both notice everything.

Libra-Libra.synthesis: You're rarely bored together. Occasionally you're frustrated by the inability to just be still.

Libra-Scorpio.synthesis: You make each other think differently — one about the world, one about themselves. That's not nothing.

Libra-Sagittarius.synthesis: There's real joy between you when you're moving. The stillness is harder for both of you, and necessary.

Libra-Capricorn.synthesis: You need each other more than you'll admit, and you both demonstrate this through argument.

Libra-Aquarius.synthesis: You understand each other at a speed that feels like recognition. Familiarity this fast always hides something.

Libra-Pisces.synthesis: You're both drawn to what the other has access to. Whether you can access it in each other is the question.

Scorpio-Scorpio.synthesis: Nobody outside this pairing fully understands what happens inside it. That's exactly how you want it.

Scorpio-Sagittarius.synthesis: You challenge each other's default mode — which is either exactly what you needed or what you weren't ready for.

Scorpio-Capricorn.synthesis: You offer each other what you each struggle most to give yourself: one of you offers ground, one of you offers feeling.

Scorpio-Aquarius.synthesis: One of you explains. One of you feels. At some point the explaining stops helping.

Scorpio-Pisces.synthesis: You feel each other before you know each other. Whether that's intimacy or projection is worth examining.

Sagittarius-Sagittarius.synthesis: You give each other permission to be more yourselves. Sometimes that permission is exactly the problem.

Sagittarius-Capricorn.synthesis: One of you wants to move before it's ready. One of you wants to wait until it's certain. Neither will be satisfied.

Sagittarius-Aquarius.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Sagittarius-Pisces.synthesis: You affect each other immediately and completely. That's not always comfortable and not always harmful.

Capricorn-Capricorn.synthesis: Neither of you wastes anything. The question is whether you're saving the relationship or just managing it.

Capricorn-Aquarius.synthesis: The ideas need grounding. The ground needs ideas. Neither of you finds this as obvious as it sounds.

Capricorn-Pisces.synthesis: The stability and the depth work well together — until they work too well and nobody grows.

Aquarius-Aquarius.synthesis: The conversation never stops. Decide if what you're talking around is more interesting than what you'd find if you arrived.

Aquarius-Pisces.synthesis: You're both drawn to what the other has access to. Whether you can access it in each other is the question.

Pisces-Pisces.synthesis: You both know how to hold pain without speaking. Decide if that's strength or evasion.

calculation_methods: Planetary longitudes: Jean Meeus 'Astronomical Algorithms' low-precision formulae (±1° accuracy)
Retrograde: computed from direction of longitude change vs previous day
Aspects: angular separation with standard orbs (conjunction 8°, sextile 6°, square/trine/opposition 8°, quincunx 3°)
Compatibility: element harmony base score + modality adjustment + date-seeded variance
Daily readings: deterministic date-seed (PRNG) selects from 60-entry per-sign pools + 30-entry suffix pool; 1,800 combinations per sign
